title: panicum bertonii
intro: Panicum bertonii, also known as Berton's Panic Grass, is a type of grass native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat digestive issues, such as diarrhea and dysentery, due to its astringent and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Panicum bertonii include its ability to reduce fever, soothe skin irritations, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis. The herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which can be made by boiling the leaves and stems in water or applying the extract directly to the affected area.
